title: Alex's caves: Crystal palace
description: A resource pack that changes up the retro skins of the Alex's Caves dinosaurs.
body:
- Retextures some Alex's caves mobs. Vanilla, Twilight forest and Aether compat.
- Gallery photos are taken with BSL shaders, structures are from the Lost Cities mod.
- **USE ETF AND EMF**
- **More will be added in future releases.**
- There is a list of nametags for each applicable pack that is downloadable in the files. 
- Thank you to MsBarebones for coming up with the bambirappel concept, Brain for helping me record some parts of the trailer.
  Trailer:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AK_pmvX4p1Q](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AK_pmvX4p1Q)
